name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
description: National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to financial services.
benefits: Zero balance account, Accidental insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakhs.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: Skill certification scheme to enable Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training.
benefits: Skill training, Certification, Placement assistance.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
description: Housing for All mission to provide affordable housing to the urban poor.
benefits: Interest subsidy on home loans.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme available to people in the age group of 18 to 50 years.
benefits: Life cover of Rs. 2 lakhs.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance scheme available to people in the age group 18 to 70 years.
benefits: Accidental death and full disability cover of Rs. 2 lakhs.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Pension scheme focused on the unorganized sector.
benefits: Fixed monthly pension ranging from Rs. 1000 to Rs. 5000.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
description: Scheme to provide LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households.
benefits: Financial support of Rs. 1600 for each LPG connection.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
description: Social security measure that aims to guarantee the 'right to work'.
benefits: At least 100 days of wage employment in a financial year.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maan-Dhan Yojana
description: Old age pension scheme for all Small and Marginal Farmers (SMF).
benefits: Fixed monthly pension of Rs. 3000 after attaining age of 60.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana
description: Scheme to bring about Blue Revolution through sustainable development of fisheries sector.
benefits: Financial assistance for fishing equipment and infrastructure.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Government sponsored crop insurance scheme.
benefits: Insurance coverage and financial support to farmers in event of failure of any of the notified crop.

name: Swachh Bharat Mission
description: National campaign to clean up the streets, roads and infrastructure of India's cities, towns, and rural areas.
benefits: Financial assistance for construction of toilets.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Placement linked skill development scheme for rural poor youth.
benefits: Free skill training and placement in formal jobs.

name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
description: Credit linked subsidy program for generation of employment opportunities through establishment of micro enterprises.
benefits: Subsidy ranging from 15% to 35% on project cost.

name: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Scheme to facilitate bank loans between 10 lakh and 1 Crore to at least one SC or ST borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch.
benefits: Bank loans for setting up a greenfield enterprise.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
description: Scheme to provide loans up to 10 lakh to the non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
benefits: Loans under three categories: Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small deposit scheme for the girl child launched as a part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign.
benefits: High interest rate and tax benefits for girl child's education and marriage.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Campaign to generate awareness and improve the efficiency of welfare services intended for girls.
benefits: Awareness and support for girl child education.

name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana
description: National health protection scheme providing health cover of Rs. 5 lakhs per family per year.
benefits: Cashless access to health care services for the beneficiary at the point of service.

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Scheme to provide term loans to farmers for their agricultural needs.
benefits: Credit at low interest rates for agricultural activities.

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana
description: Scheme to ensure access to some means of protective irrigation to all agricultural farms in the country.
benefits: Subsidies for micro-irrigation systems.

name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - NRLM
description: Scheme to promote self-employment and organization of rural poor.
benefits: Financial support and training for Self Help Groups (SHGs).

name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - NULM
description: Scheme to reduce poverty and vulnerability of the urban poor households.
benefits: Skill training and placement, support for urban street vendors.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support scheme for all landholding farmers' families.
benefits: Rs. 6000 per year in three equal installments.

name: National Social Assistance Programme
description: Social security scheme for the elderly, widows and persons with disabilities.
benefits: Monthly pension for eligible beneficiaries.

name: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNidhi
description: Special micro-credit facility for street vendors.
benefits: Working capital loan up to Rs. 10,000.

name: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
description: Food security welfare scheme to provide free food grains to the poor.
benefits: 5 kg of free food grains per person per month.

name: Pradhan Mantri Daksh Yojana
description: Skill development scheme for marginalized sections of society.
benefits: Skill training and stipend for eligible candidates.

name: Pradhan Mantri Vishwakarma
description: Scheme to support traditional artisans and craftspeople.
benefits: Skill upgradation, toolkit incentive, and credit support.

name: Post Matric Scholarship
description: Scholarship for students from SC/ST/OBC categories for pursuing higher education.
benefits: Financial assistance for tuition fees and maintenance allowance.

name: National Scholarship Portal
description: One-stop solution for various scholarship schemes offered by Central and State governments.
benefits: Various scholarship amounts based on the specific scheme.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Kendra
description: State-of-the-art Model Training Centres to provide skill training.
benefits: Industry-relevant skill training and certification.

name: Pradhan Mantri Adarsh Gram Yojana
description: Scheme for integrated development of Scheduled Caste majority villages.
benefits: Infrastructure development in eligible villages.

name: Pradhan Mantri Yuva Yojana
description: Scheme to create an enabling ecosystem for entrepreneurship development.
benefits: Entrepreneurship education and training.

name: PM SHRI Schools
description: Scheme for development of more than 14500 schools across India.
benefits: High-quality education in a modern environment.

name: PM National Apprenticeship Mela
description: Event to provide apprenticeship opportunities to youth.
benefits: Apprenticeship training and stipend.

name: PM Internship Scheme
description: Scheme to provide internship opportunities in top 500 companies.
benefits: Monthly stipend of Rs. 5000 and one-time assistance of Rs. 6000.

name: PM E-Vidya
description: Unified effort to enable multi-mode access to digital/online education.
benefits: Access to digital learning resources.

name: PM WANI
description: Scheme to increase broadband proliferation across the country.
benefits: Access to public Wi-Fi networks.

name: PM Bharatiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
description: Campaign to provide quality medicines at affordable prices to all.
benefits: Access to generic medicines at low cost.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Sampada Yojana
description: Scheme for agro-marine processing and development of agro-processing clusters.
benefits: Financial assistance for setting up food processing units.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana 4.0
description: Latest version of the skill development scheme with focus on New Age courses.
benefits: Training in AI, Robotics, Mechatronics, etc.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan (KUSUM)
description: Scheme for installation of solar pumps and grid connected solar power plants.
benefits: Subsidies for solar water pumps.

name: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
description: Scheme to provide free electricity to households by installing rooftop solar panels.
benefits: Subsidy for rooftop solar and free electricity up to 300 units.

name: PM Vayu Swasthya Seva
description: Air ambulance service for remote areas.
benefits: Emergency medical transport by air.

name: PM Janman
description: Mission for the development of Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups (PVTGs).
benefits: Integrated development of PVTG habitations.

name: PM Asha
description: Umbrella scheme to ensure remunerative prices to farmers for their produce.
benefits: Price support and price deficiency payment.

name: PM DevINE
description: Prime Minister’s Development Initiative for North East Region.
benefits: Infrastructure and social development projects in North East.

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Maternity benefit program for pregnant and lactating mothers.
benefits: Cash incentive of Rs. 5000 in three installments.

name: PM Kisan Maandhan Yojana
description: Pension scheme for small and marginal farmers.
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs. 3000 after 60 years.
